name: Milky Wonder Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter a 9-inch fluted tube pan.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the Milky Way candy bars and 1/2 cup of butter or margarine. Melt over low heat, stirring until smooth.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream the remaining 1/2 cup butter or margarine and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add vanilla extract and melted candy to the mixture. Beat until light and fluffy.
6. Combine flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
7. Alternately add the flour mixture and buttermilk to the batter, folding gently.
8. Fold in chopped nuts.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out dry. The top will be quite dark.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it.
12. Cool completely on a wire rack. Frost if desired. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
